Item Name: 100% Kona Coffee - Medium Dark Roast Single Serve Cups by Hualalai Estate - 12 count - Premium Ground Kona Coffee Bullet Point 1: 100% PURE KONA COFFEE: Experience the world-renowned natural gourmet flavors of pure Kona KCups. With delicious fruity notes, a light spice, full body, and easy recyclable package this is sure to become a grocery staple in your home. Bullet Point 2: ROASTED TO PERFECTION: We use a medium dark roast to perfectly bring out the complex and subtle flavors of Kona. Our beans are carefully chosen for uniformity to guarantee a perfect and consistent level of roast throughout, ground, and sealed in Keurig coffee pods. Bullet Point 3: PESTICIDE-FREE NATURAL BEANS: To grow Hawaii's finest single serve coffee you need the highest quality care from start to finish. We choose only the most premium select beans to create our pure Kona grounds. We're always pesticide-free and naturally grown. Bullet Point 4: FRESH AND FULL BODIED: Our arabica beans are roasted by artisan coffee roasters, ground, and immediately freshly packaged to seal in the maximum amount of flavor. You'll love pure Kona Hawaiian coffee in your french press, pour over, cold brew, or drip brew. Bullet Point 5: HUALALAI ESTATE: For over 25 years we've been growing and selling the finest American-made coffee to customers across Hawaii and the rest of the USA. Try the Kona coffee preferred by Hawaiians, take a sip from Hualalai Estate. Product Description: Hualalai Estate: 100% Pure Kona Medium Dark Roast - Keurig Compatible K-Cups (12 Cups)
Get your coffee, fast, fresh, and convenient. The smoothest, most satisfying cup of coffee you've ever had is waiting for you. The sweet, fruity flavor of Kona combines with notes of spice and a deep complex full body to create one of the most premium gourmet coffee experiences in the world. Try the single-serve coffee loved most by Hawaiians and appreciated the world over. Try a cup of Hualalai Estate.

A True Gourmet Experience
To grow the best coffee you have to start with the best. Our arabica beans are carefully raised naturally, without pesticides, and harvested at the peak of flavor. From there select only the largest, most uniform beans to be included in our Kona grounds. The uniform beam size ensures a clear and consistent flavor profile during our roasting. Our artisans perform a medium dark roast to fully bring out the body of Kona without diminishing the incredible fruity flavors that make this coffee unique. The coffee is immediately sealed in pods after roasting and grinding to preserve maximum freshness.

Our coffee pods are compatible with Keurig K-Cup brewing systems including Keurig 1.0 and 2.0.

Hualalai Estate
If you want to try the finest American grown coffee in the world, you need a cup of our Kona Coffee. For over 25 years we've been supplying coffee to homes and restaurants across Hawaii and the USA. Try a better class of coffee, try Hualalai Estate.

catalog_content:
Item Name: AIVA Basmati Rice, 10 Pound, Authentic Long Grain, Aged, Naturally Gluten Free and Non-GMO, Vegan Rice Bulk Bag
Bullet Point 1: Naturally sourced, grown, harvested, and cared for with the highest level of integrity and expertise from local growers in the regions renowned for producing the finest crops in India.
Bullet Point 2: Nutritional Value: Basmati rice is a good source of carbohydrates, providing energy. It also contains a moderate amount of protein and is low in fat. Some varieties, particularly brown Basmati, offer higher fiber content and additional nutrients such as vitamins and minerals Basmati rice is vegan, Non-GMO, Naturally gluten-free, Aged, extra long grain.
Bullet Point 3: Culinary Uses: Basmati rice is versatile and used in various culinary traditions. It is a staple in Indian and Pakistani cuisines, often featured in dishes like biryanis, pilafs, and as a side to curries and stews. Its delicate flavor makes it a perfect complement to a wide range of ingredients and spices.
Bullet Point 4: Grain Length and Texture: The grains of Basmati rice are longer and thinner compared to other types of rice. When cooked, the grains elongate further and remain separate and fluffy rather than sticky.
Bullet Point 5: Aroma and Flavor: Basmati rice is renowned for its nutty flavor and aromatic scent, often described as pandan-like or reminiscent of popcorn. This unique fragrance is due to a compound called 2-acetyl-1-pyrroline.
Product Description: Basmati rice is a long-grain variety of rice known for its fragrant aroma, unique flavor, and distinctively slender grains. Originating from the Indian subcontinent, Basmati rice has been cultivated for centuries in the fertile regions of India and Pakistan, particularly in the foothills of the Himalayas. Basmati rice holds a special place in the culinary traditions and cultures of the regions where it is grown. It is often associated with festive occasions and special meals, symbolizing hospitality and luxury. The name "Basmati" itself means "fragrant" in Hindi, reflecting its distinctive aroma. Overall, Basmati rice is prized not only for its sensory qualities but also for its versatility in cooking, making it a cherished ingredient in kitchens around the world.
Value: 160.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium-positioned product with high-end packaging and branding cues (e.g., aged, extra long grain, aromatic claims) suggesting a mid-to-high price tier. The 10 lb bulk format provides strong value for bulk buyers, while 'Product of India' and 'local growers' imply quality sourcing. Absence of visible certifications may limit perceived premium status, but the 'vegan', 'non-GMO', and 'gluten-free' claims add to its niche appeal for health-conscious consumers.
